channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania launches green financing strategy to help farmers adapt to climate change
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB) has introduced a new green financing strategy called the Green Agri-Finance Strategy 2025–2027. The main goal is to help farmers and a...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa Surfaces at Senate Amid ICC Arrest Warrant and Security Incident
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa resurfaced at the Senate on May 11 after reportedly evading an International Criminal Court (ICC) arrest warrant linked to alleged crimes against humanity during the Du...

item.title: 1957 Jensen 541 Deluxe: Innovative British Sports Saloon with Fiberglass Body
item.description: The 1957 Jensen 541 Deluxe was a remarkable British grand tourer that showcased pioneering use of fiberglass bodywork. Introduced in 1953, the car was one of the earliest to utilize this lightweight c...

item.title: Teresa Wilms Montt: Rebel Writer and Feminist Pioneer of Early 20th-Century Chile
item.description: Teresa Wilms Montt (1893–1921) was a pioneering Chilean writer, poet, and anarcha-feminist whose life was marked by rebellion, literary innovation, and personal tragedy. Born into an elite Chilean fam...

item.title: Ruto Emphasises Kenya’s Neutral Role Amid Sudan Conflict, Calls for Broader Peace Efforts
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly clarified Kenya’s neutral stance in the ongoing Sudan conflict, rejecting claims that Nairobi supports the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) led by General He...

item.title: Katie Price expresses frustration over husband's missed UK visit and relationship issues
item.description: Katie Price publicly criticised her husband, Lee Andrews, after he failed to arrive in the UK for their scheduled Good Morning Britain interview, calling the situation a 'soap opera'. According to Kat...

item.title: Joseph Southall and His Mastery of Egg Tempera in the Arts and Crafts Movement
item.description: Joseph Southall (1861–1944) was a central figure in the British Arts and Crafts movement and a leading member of the Birmingham Group of artist-craftsmen. Renowned for his expertise in the challenging...

item.title: Elon Musk criticised for comments on Lupita Nyong’o’s casting in The Odyssey
item.description: Elon Musk has faced criticism after commenting on the casting of Lupita Nyong’o in Christopher Nolan’s forthcoming film, The Odyssey. Nyong’o, an Oscar-winning actress, has been cast in dual roles as ...

item.title: Xi Jinping highlights cooperative and cautious approach in US-China relations
item.description: On May 14, 2026, Chinese President Xi Jinping welcomed what he called a 'new positioning' in the relationship between China and the United States, following a summit with US President Donald Trump in ...

item.title: Luxury Supercars as Office Decor in 1990s Wall Street
item.description: During the 1990s, a remarkable and extravagant trend emerged among wealthy Wall Street financiers: placing luxury supercars such as Ferraris, Lamborghinis, and Porsches inside high-rise offices, penth...

item.title: Ruto Explains Why Kenya-Somalia Border Reopening Has Been Delayed
item.description: President William Ruto has explained that Kenya’s plans to fully reopen the border with Somalia have stalled due to renewed fighting and political instability in Somalia. Speaking to France 24 during ...

item.title: PTI MNA's son seeks asylum in Italy while holding diplomatic passport
item.description: During a recent Senate Standing Committee meeting, Minister of State for Interior Talal Chaudhry revealed that the son of PTI lawmaker Iqbal Afridi travelled to Italy on a blue diplomatic passport and...

item.title: Obama Critiques Trump's Decision to Withdraw from the Iran Nuclear Deal
item.description: In a recent interview on “Late Night” with Stephen Colbert, former President Barack Obama criticized President Donald Trump's withdrawal from the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA), commonly k...

item.title: B.C. judge finds insufficient evidence to convict former RCMP officer in foreign interference case
item.description: A British Columbia Supreme Court judge has acquitted former RCMP officer William Majcher of a foreign interference-related charge under Canada’s Security of Information Act. Prosecutors alleged that M...

item.title: Police Constable Dies After Injuries from Charsadda Checkpost Attack
item.description: In Charsadda, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Constable Sajjad Khan tragically passed away on Wednesday night after being critically injured in an attack on Azizabad checkpost last month. According to Charsadda p...

item.title: Senate targets May 18 convening of impeachment court for VP Sara Duterte case
item.description: Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano said the Senate may formally convene as an impeachment court on May 18, 2026, following the chamber’s receipt of the Articles of Impeachment against Vice President...

item.title: Sophia Loren's On-Set Portraits from the 1954 Italian Film 'Two Nights with Cleopatra'
item.description: The 1954 Italian film 'Two Nights with Cleopatra' (Due notti con Cleopatra) played a pivotal role in launching the career of a young Sophia Loren. At just 19 years old, Loren took on the dual role of ...

item.title: The Life and Legacy of Swedish Dancer Sent M’Ahesa in the Early 20th Century
item.description: Sent M'Ahesa, born Else Margaretha Luisa von Carlberg on August 17, 1883, in Riga, was a Swedish dancer, journalist, and translator known for her innovative expressionist performances inspired by anci...

item.title: Australian Embassy Alerts Kenyans About Fake Job and Visa Offers
item.description: The Australian Embassy in Nairobi has issued a warning to Kenyans aiming to work or travel to Australia to be cautious of scams. Many private firms have been falsely claiming to provide guaranteed Aus...

item.title: Analysis of the Coalition’s Focus in Budget Response
item.description: The article examines the Coalition's response to the latest federal budget, highlighting the strategic approach taken by the party to appeal to specific voter groups. Fiona Katauskas's cartoons unders...
